claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: a holdout repair, general candidate-generation advantage, temporal transfer, cross-machine transfer, real hardware, mitigation, soundness, quantum advantage, BQP separation, solved B4/B8/B10, or new credit
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: one target-aware generated Jakarta dense-XY candidate selected without copying frozen route identities or reading R148 hidden rows

requirements.label: R148 design/result provenance, R143 exclusion identity, R125 metadata, and task builder are bound
all 5,040 mappings are accounted for and three frozen identities are excluded
three static rankings produce 12 unique mappings
12 mappings, two policies, and two realization seeds produce 48 candidates
48-to-12-to-3-to-1 successive halving charges 264 executions and 32 post-selection diagnostics do not affect selection
selected mapping copies neither target R143 nor foreign R148 identities
R148 hidden rows are not loaded for generation or selection
no R149 holdout is executed during design
hardware, advantage, solved-frontier, and credit claims remain false

title: B4/B8 R149 Jakarta dense-XY target-aware candidate generation design
